title: stelis mesohybos
intro: Stelis mesohybos, also known as the Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Stelis mesohybos include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, Stelis mesohybos is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
